codeReview.summary: The fix-simulator-link feature correctly addresses the original failure. The 'Run in Simulator' button now passes example code via base64-encoded URL search params, and the SimulatorPage reads and displays the code on mount.

summary: Review PASS: The fix adequately addresses the original blocking issue from example-code-viewer review where the 'Run in Simulator' button linked to /simulator without pre-loading code. The implementation correctly: (1) base64-encodes example code and passes it via search params in ExampleDetail.tsx Link component, (2) SimulatorPage reads code from URL search params on mount using useLocation and decodes with atob(), (3) displays an indicator showing code was loaded from example. All verification checks passed (TypeScript, lint, build).
